title: <div>(Alright you can tell I'm mad about it (I don't know why I'm speaking to YO
content: (Alright you can tell I'm mad about it (I don't know why I'm speaking to YOU in parenthetically, when this whole point of this is speaking to you). You -- you've been here before haven't you? (Maybe not this exact position (there I go again (dammit))). Trying to figure out what to write. What face to where.
